commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Claude/Codex MCP config files and a Codex AGENTS symlink, expands root ignore rules for backups/env files, and marks the root package private.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: the PR diff directly adds repo-level MCP/Codex config that invokes uvx/npx and forwards GitHub token environment variables. I did not execute those launchers because this is a read-only security review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to decide whether Crabbox should own repo-scoped MCP launch config and package private metadata; automation should not choose that trust boundary.

target.title: chore: cross-tool MCP scoping + portfolio health hardening
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds .mcp.json with portable env-var stanzas (context7, fetch, github)
- Adds .codex/config.toml with matching Codex overlay
- Adds .codex/AGENTS.md symlink -> ../AGENTS.md
- Patches .gitignore (*.backup-*, .env, .dev.vars)
- Adds "private": true to package.json

Part of cross-tool MCP scoping rollout (see SECURITY_TOKEN_ROTATION_2026-05-25 + MCP_PORTFOLIO_DASHBOARD docs in home-agent-config).

Note: Submitted from fork (LDMB123/crabbox) due to read-only org perms. Merge when convenient.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: ldmb123
